eMenu API Dashboard
App-to-App Flow Tester
01App Setup
GET/reservation/public/api/{slug}
idle
POST/user/public/verify-employee-id
idle
02Table Selection
GET/.../{slug}/floors
idle
GET/.../{slug}/table/{key}
idle
03View Menu
GET/emenu/.../menus
idle
GET/emenu/.../menus/{uid}
idle
04Place Order (Cart)
Cart Items (0)
No items. Add items from Phase 3.
POST/order/public/carts/initiate
idle
POST/emenu/.../validate-order
idle
POST/order/public/carts/{key}/save
idle
POST/order/public/carts/{key}/checkout
idle
05Payment (A2A)
Complete Phase 4 checkout or load an order from Phase 6 first.
POST/.../{order}/payments/initiate
idle
POST/.../{order}/payments/splits
idle
POST/.../{key}/lock
idle
POST/.../{key}/complete
idle
DELETE/.../{order}/payments/splits
idle
06View Orders
POST/order/public/orders/table
idle
Select a table in Phase 2 first
POST/order/public/orders/{order}/sync
idle
GET/order/public/orders/list
idle
